---
title: "VVizard Caverns of the Juul Realms"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    include-in-header: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* BACKGROUND — EXACT */
body {
  background: #000 url("//storage.proboards.com/7381569/images/8tqQmZ0uQxq3u1J7xW0E.png") repeat fixed center top;
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
}

/* WRAPPER */
#wrapper {
  width: 90%;
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

/* HEADER IMAGE — EXACT */
#banner-container {
  margin-top: 10px;
}

#logo {
  background-image: url("//storage.proboards.com/7381569/images/GCjYXfNHCsGDSgEFd0WJ.png");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 180px;
}

/* NAVIGATION */
#navigation-menu {
  background: #222;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  color: #fff;
  margin-top: 5px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  font-size: 13px;
}

#navigation-menu ul {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  display: flex;
}

#navigation-menu li {
  margin-right: 15px;
}

#navigation-menu a {
  color: #fff;
  text-decoration: none;
}

#navigation-menu a.state-active {
  font-weight: bold;
}

#welcome a {
  color: #fff;
  text-decoration: none;
  margin-left: 10px;
}

/* CATEGORY CONTAINERS */
.container.boards {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
  margin-top: 20px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding-bottom: 5px;
}

/* TITLE BAR */
.title-bar {
  background: #333;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  color: #fff;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #000;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.title-bar h2 {
  margin: 0;
}

.title_wrapper {
  display: inline-block;
}

/* TABLE */
.content {
  padding: 0;
}

table.list {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 13px;
}

table.list th,
table.list td {
  padding: 8px 10px;
  color: #fff;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #444;
}

table.list th.icon,
table.list td.icon {
  width: 40px;
}

table.list th.threads,
table.list th.posts {
  width: 60px;
  text-align: center;
}

table.list td.threads,
table.list td.posts {
  text-align: center;
}

table.list th.latest,
table.list td.latest {
  width: 180px;
  font-size: 11px;
}

table.list tr:hover {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}

/* BOARD ROWS */
.o-board.board.item.first td {
  border-top: 1px solid #444;
}

.main .link a {
  color: #fff;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.main .description {
  margin: 2px 0 0 0;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #ccc;
}

/* ICON */
.icon img {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
}
</style>

<div id="wrapper">

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <header>
    <div id="banner-container" role="banner">
      <h2 id="banner">
        <a id="logo" href="#"></a>
      </h2>
    </div>

    <!-- NAVIGATION -->
    <nav id="navigation-menu">
      <ul>
        <li><a class="state-active" href="#">Home</a></li>
        <li><a href="#">Help</a></li>
        <li><a href="#">Search</a></li>
      </ul>
      <p id="welcome">
        <a href="#">Login</a>
        <a href="#">Register</a>
      </p>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <!-- CATEGORY 1 -->
  <a id="category-1"></a>
  <div class="container boards">
    <div class="title-bar">
      <h2><div class="title_wrapper">Category 1</div></h2>
    </div>

    <div class="content cap-bottom">
      <table class="list">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th class="icon"></th>
            <th class="main"></th>
            <th class="threads">Threads</th>
            <th class="posts">Posts</th>
            <th class="latest last">Last Post</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>

          <tr class="o-board board item first">
            <td class="icon">
              <img src="board-no-new-post.png" alt="">
            </td>
            <td class="main clickable">
              <span class="link"><a href="#">General Discussion</a></span>
              <p class="description">Talk about anything.</p>
            </td>
            <td class="threads">—</td>
            <td class="posts">—</td>
            <td class="latest last">
              <span class="date">No posts</span>
            </td>
          </tr>

          <tr class="o-board board item">
            <td class="icon">
              <img src="board-no-new-post.png" alt="">
            </td>
            <td class="main clickable">
              <span class="link"><a href="#">Goblin RP Space</a></span>
              <p class="description">Roleplay with goblins.</p>
            </td>
            <td class="threads">—</td>
            <td class="posts">—</td>
            <td class="latest last">
              <span class="date">No posts</span>
            </td>
          </tr>

          <tr class="o-board board item last">
            <td class="icon">
              <img src="board-no-new-post.png" alt="">
            </td>
            <td class="main clickable">
              <span class="link"><a href="#">MS Paint Creations</a></span>
              <p class="description">Art made in MS Paint.</p>
            </td>
            <td class="threads">—</td>
            <td class="posts">—</td>
            <td class="latest last">
              <span class="date">No posts</span>
            </td>
          </tr>

        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CATEGORY 4 -->
  <a id="category-4"></a>
  <div class="container boards">
    <div class="title-bar">
      <h2><div class="title_wrapper">Category 4</div></h2>
    </div>

    <div class="content cap-bottom">
      <table class="list">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th class="icon"></th>
            <th class="main"></th>
            <th class="threads">Threads</th>
            <th class="posts">Posts</th>
            <th class="latest last">Last Post</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>

          <tr class="o-board board item first">
            <td class="icon"><img src="board-no-new-post.png" alt=""></td>
            <td class="main clickable">
              <span class="link"><a href="#">Lemon Particracy</a></span>
              <p class="description">A political simulation.</p>
            </td>
            <td class="threads">—</td>
            <td class="posts">—</td>
            <td class="latest last">No posts</td>
          </tr>

          <tr class="o-board board item last">
            <td class="icon"><img src="board-no-new-post.png" alt=""></td>
            <td class="main clickable">
              <span class="link"><a href="#">Commoragh Speedway</a></span>
              <p class="description">Racing and chaos.</p>
            </td>
            <td class="threads">—</td>
            <td class="posts">—</td>
            <td class="latest last">No posts</td>
          </tr>

        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CATEGORY 3 -->
  <a id="category-3"></a>
  <div class="container boards">
    <div class="title-bar">
      <h2><div class="title_wrapper">Category 3</div></h2>
    </div>

    <div class="content cap-bottom">
      <table class="list">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th class="icon"></th>
            <th class="main"></th>
            <th class="threads">Threads</th>
            <th class="posts">Posts</th>
            <th class="latest last">Last Post</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>

          <tr class="o-board board item first">
            <td class="icon"><img src="board-no-new-post.png" alt=""></td>
            <td class="main clickable">
              <span class="link"><a href="#">Da Lore Zone</a></span>
              <p class="description">Lore discussions.</p>
            </td>
            <td class="threads">—</td>
            <td class="posts">—</td>
            <td class="latest last">No posts</td>
          </tr>

          <tr class="o-board board item last">
            <td class="icon"><img src="board-no-new-post.png" alt=""></td>
            <td class="main clickable">
              <span class="link"><a href="#">Da Rulez Zone</a></span>
              <p class="description">Rules and mechanics.</p>
            </td>
            <td class="threads">—</td>
            <td class="posts">—</td>
            <td class="latest last">No posts</td>
          </tr>

        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
